description: Complete codified Colorado statutory law across 44 titles.
access_notes: Bulk SGML is available free on request. Contact yelena.love@coleg.gov or 303-866-2295.
known_gaps: No versioned historical snapshots in machine-readable form.
Bulk SGML requires request workflow rather than public unauthenticated download.
license: Official public legal source; reuse policy to be confirmed per source package.

description: Administrative rules from Colorado rulemaking departments and agencies.
access_notes: No bulk API identified. Scrape rule-by-rule and prefer DOCX when both DOCX and PDF are available.
known_gaps: No public bulk download or API identified.
license: Official public legal source; reuse policy to be confirmed.

description: Structured bill data including text, sponsors, votes, status, and subjects.
access_notes: Requires LEGISCAN_API_KEY. Use raw JSON archive under _RAW_ARCHIVE/legiscan/.
update_frequency: weekly during session; monthly off session
known_gaps: Pre-2010 coverage requires separate historical session-law sources.
license: LegiScan data terms and CC BY 4.0 references to be reviewed before redistribution.

description: Twice-monthly rulemaking notices including proposed, adopted, and emergency rules.
access_notes: Scrape archive pages and linked publications; normalize notices into rulemaking_notice records.
known_gaps: Notice-to-CCR-rule relationships require extraction and validation.
license: Official public legal source; reuse policy to be confirmed.

description: Governor's executive orders in PDF and HTML form.
access_notes: Scrape index pages, download linked PDFs, and extract signed date, order number, status, and cited statutes.
known_gaps: Historical executive orders may require archive discovery beyond current web pages.
license: Official public government documents; reuse policy to be confirmed.

description: Sunrise and sunset reviews of licensing and regulatory programs.
access_notes: Scrape report listings and archive PDFs under _RAW_ARCHIVE/supplementary/coprrr when added.
known_gaps: Program-to-statute crosswalk requires extraction from report text.
license: Official public government reports; reuse policy to be confirmed.

description: Formal Attorney General opinions interpreting Colorado law.
access_notes: Scrape opinion listings and linked opinion documents; extract issued date and statutes interpreted.
known_gaps: Older opinions may require archive traversal and manual date normalization.
license: Official public government opinions; reuse policy to be confirmed.
